sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96598" key="sternobriqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερνο-βρῑθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n96598.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a strong chest</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἵπποι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:7:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.12</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στενο-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
